title: T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions:
T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions!
